creator: empty.japan
caption:
Matsumoto has so much to offer, but the light-up event is truly incredible!

Also, I might’ve added too much text in the video - still experimenting with this new format. Did it feel alright, or was it distracting? Let me know!

You can catch the light-up event from December 14th to February 16th, 18:00–22:00.
📍Matsumoto Castle
It seems to be an annual event, but don’t blame me if it doesn’t happen next year 😅

transcription.text: 会不会买和生菜 现在来灯 Nice one 四季豆 准备吃饭 大伯父的船 砪很大 早饭 frontside 不过大伯父是韩国人 所以汤庙是韩国人的 现场 乌鲁木齐 不要理睬我们 请不吝点赞 订阅 转发 打赏支持明镜与点点栏目
